summary: A 6-second silent text-card graphic from CISA's '#12DaysofTips' series advising people to protect online accounts from ransomware by visiting stopransomware.gov, set over an animated snowflake background with a DHS seal. No audio and no music; it is a plain informational text promo, not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: TODAY'S TIP: PROTECT ONLINE ACCOUNTS FROM RANSOMWARE BY VISITING STOPRANSOMWARE.GOV; #12DaysofTips
